collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (14 total Queries, 14 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `notifications`.`id`, `notifications`.`title`, `notifications`.`message`, `notifications`.`is_read`, `notifications`.`created_at`, `notifications`.`is_admin_only`, IFNULL(notifications.type, "system") as type, IFNULL(notifications.link, "") as link, IFNULL(admins.name, "System") as staff_name FROM `notifications` LEFT JOIN `admins` ON `admins`.`id` = `notifications`.`user_id` WHERE `notifications`.`is_admin_only` >= 0 ORDER BY `notifications`.`created_at` DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt, COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) amt, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) recv, COALESCE(SUM(balance_due), 0) bal FROM invoices WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt, COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) amt, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) recv, COALESCE(SUM(balance_due), 0) bal FROM invoices WHERE YEARWEEK(created_at) = YEARWEEK(NOW())

SELECT COUNT(*) cnt, COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) amt, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) recv, COALESCE(SUM(balance_due), 0) bal FROM invoices WHERE MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(NOW()) AND YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(NOW())

SELECT COUNT(*) cnt, COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) amt, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) recv, COALESCE(SUM(balance_due), 0) bal FROM invoices WHERE QUARTER(created_at) = QUARTER(NOW()) AND YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt, COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) amt, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) recv, COALESCE(SUM(balance_due), 0) bal FROM invoices WHERE YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(NOW())
SELECT i.*, c.display_name AS cname FROM invoices i LEFT JOIN customers c ON i.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY i.id DESC LIMIT 5

timelineData.name: Query
